markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review QBR performance and align on the final months of the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Quality vs. Volume:** Aembit views the engagement as a volume-only play, citing persistent technical inaccuracies (e.g., conflating identity/credentials) and outdated information (e.g., on MCP specs) that forced them to lower expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [**Performance Disconnect:** GrowthX presented traffic growth (+68x) and strong AI visibility wins, but Aembit dismissed these as insufficient for their enterprise model, which requires massive reach to secure a few high-value customers.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [**Misaligned Priorities:** GrowthX proposed focusing on conversion tracking, but Aembit rejected this. Their priority is achieving the original goal of massive top-of-funnel reach before shifting focus.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** The parties will pause renewal talks and focus the next three months on fixing quality issues and increasing content velocity to meet Aembit's core objective.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)

## Topics

### Performance Review & Quality Concerns

  - [**GrowthX's QBR Framing:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=412.0)
      - [**Original Goal:** Build organic presence for a category-defining product.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
      - [**Metrics:** 106 articles, 55 page-one rankings, 68x session growth, 40% engagement rate (higher than site average).](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [**Aembit's Rebuttal:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**Core Issue:** The engagement is a volume play, not a quality one.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
      - [**Specific Failures:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
          - [**Technical Inaccuracy:** Persistent errors, like conflating identity and credentials, forced Aembit to abandon technical topics.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
          - [**Outdated Information:** Content on rapidly changing topics (e.g., MCP specs) was based on old data, making it irrelevant.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3243.0)
          - [**Ineffective Feedback Loop:** Feedback on recurring issues is not being incorporated into future content.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
      - [**Traffic Insufficiency:** Current traffic volume (\~750 sessions/month) is too low for their enterprise model, which requires massive reach to secure a few customers.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)

### Path Forward: Quality & Reach

  - [**GrowthX's Proposed Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2379.0)
      - [**Strategy:** Expand into broader, higher-volume top-of-funnel topics (e.g., API security) to build authority for niche terms.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2387.0)
      - [**Tactics:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
          - [Create AI agent security articles.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
          - [Refresh underperforming content.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2520.0)
          - [Repurpose high-performing articles into new formats (e.g., resource hubs, sales assets).](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2705.0)
  - [**Aembit's Response:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
      - [**Priority:** Fix quality and achieve the original goal of massive reach before adding new initiatives like conversion tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2806.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Adding more tasks while core problems persist will only create distraction and dilute focus.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3007.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
      - [Provide Ashur a walkthrough of the "Atlas" content pipeline to explain the feedback loop.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3188.0)
      - [Investigate and fix the root cause of outdated content (e.g., on MCP specs).](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=3243.0)
      - [Deliver a revised 3-month plan focused on quality, velocity, and keyword strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2324.0)
      - [Provide a list of potential content repurposing formats.](https://fathom.video/share/gGTJMX-v8DGRLwnc7z1RKEthA2VX61yv?tab=summary&timestamp=2550.0)
